summary: Tested Share Anonymized Report feature. Backend: 11/11 tests passed for POST /api/reports/share and GET /api/reports/{report_id}. Frontend: SharedReport page displays all required elements (score ring, score value, pattern comparison, perception consistency, recommended actions, footer disclaimer, CTA link). 404 page works correctly for invalid report IDs. Mobile responsiveness excellent with no horizontal scrolling.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/reports/share creates report and returns report_id (12 char)
Backend: POST /api/reports/share works with minimal data
Backend: POST /api/reports/share works with empty body
Backend: GET /api/reports/{report_id} returns stored report data
Backend: GET /api/reports/invalid-id returns 404
Backend: GET /api/reports/{nonexistent-uuid} returns 404
Backend: Report does not store session_id (anonymized)

Backend: Report contains all required fields (report_id, created_at, suspicion_score, suspicion_label, pattern_comparison_pct, pattern_statistics, perception_consistency, clarity_actions, dominant_pattern, trustlens_perspective)
Backend: Report limits clarity_actions to first 4 items
Backend: Integration test - create report from real analysis results
Frontend: SharedReport page container loads (data-testid=shared-report-page)
Frontend: Score ring displays (data-testid=shared-score-ring)
Frontend: Score value displays correctly (data-testid=shared-score-value)
Frontend: 'ANONYMIZED ANALYSIS REPORT' header text visible
Frontend: Footer disclaimer 'This report was generated using TrustLens relationship pattern analysis' visible
Frontend: Pattern Comparison section displays with percentage
Frontend: Perception Consistency section displays with inconsistencies list
Frontend: Recommended Actions section displays
Frontend: 'Try TrustLens' CTA link present (data-testid=shared-report-cta)
Frontend: Suspicion label displays (e.g. 'Moderate Signal')
Frontend: 404 page shows 'Report Not Found' for invalid IDs
Frontend: 404 page shows 'Go to TrustLens' link
Frontend: Mobile (390x844) - no horizontal scrolling
Frontend: Mobile - score ring visible and readable
Frontend: Mobile - all sections properly stacked and accessible
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented in SharedReport.jsx: shared-report-page, shared-score-ring, shared-score-value, shared-report-cta
Share button in ResultsDashboard.jsx has data-testid=share-report-btn and appears at Stage 11
API integration properly uses createSharedReport and getSharedReport from lib/api.js
Report data is properly anonymized - only stores score, label, statistics, actions, perspective
clarity_actions correctly truncated to max 4 items server-side
seed_data_creation: Created test shared report at /report/64c1f059-3c7 for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Anonymized Report feature fully implemented and tested. POST /api/reports/share creates reports in db.shared_reports collection. GET /api/reports/{report_id} retrieves them. SharedReport.jsx page at /report/:reportId displays all content with proper data-testid attributes. Share button on ResultsDashboard appears at Stage 11 (~10.5s after results load). To test share button click on Results page, need to complete full analysis flow (Landing → Clarity → Deep Analysis → Baseline → Changes → Timeline → 5+ Questions → Results → wait 10.5s → Share button visible).
mocked_api_note: AI analysis uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with fallback to hardcoded responses. Share report feature does NOT use AI - purely data storage/retrieval.
